updates.title: Unified Media Retention Protocol
updates.description: Implemented a universal 14-day retention policy across all media types. This superseded the previous multi-tier retention concept.
updates.rationale: To simplify system architecture and provide a consistent user expectation for data ephemeralness.

updates.title: Advanced Multi-Modal Sharing
updates.description: Enabled support for 4K Videos, Zip Archives, and HTML documents with a 200MB limit. Replaced the earlier image-centric sharing model.
updates.rationale: Transitions the platform from a simple chat app to a robust communication ecosystem.

updates.title: Performance Optimization (120Hz)
updates.description: Finalized high-refresh-rate rendering paths for modern mobile devices.
updates.rationale: Ensures the 'Ovii' experience feels premium on flagship hardware.

updates.title: Visual Identity & Doodle Layer
updates.description: Integrated the custom-engineered WhatsApp-inspired doodle background and real-time upload feedback.
updates.rationale: Enhances emotional connection and visual stability.

updates.title: Conceptual News Notification Logic
updates.description: Explored a 1-hour throttled news push notification system for offline users.
updates.rationale: Testing user engagement triggers without causing 'notification fatigue'.

updates.title: Glassmorphism 2.0 Interface
updates.description: Total overhaul of the UI components into a high-fidelity glassmorphic system.
updates.rationale: Achieves the 'Top Notch' aesthetic requested for the ecosystem's core identity.

updates.title: Multi-Tier Retention Logic
updates.description: Initial logic for 5-day text and 7-day voice retention was built but later removed in favor of the Unified 14-day Protocol.
updates.rationale: System complexity was reduced to improve database performance and user clarity.

updates.title: Session Continuity (No Lock)
updates.description: Implemented the mechanism to prevent session timeouts during active use.
updates.rationale: Crucial for maintaining a stable communication channel.

updates.title: Full-Bleed Desktop Transformation
updates.description: Initial conversion from mobile-first to a responsive full-bleed wide-screen layout.
updates.rationale: First major step in the 'Desktop-Native' evolution.
